case_title: THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ZIA RAHIM et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAHIM, ZIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 3/25/08 $3,020.00 RENT, $455.00 COSTS, $4,837.32 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,312.32, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RAHIM, ZIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAHIM, ZIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 680 MISSION ST. #14-T, S.F. CA. 94105, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RAHIM, ZIA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $599.00 INTEREST, $60.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION OF ZIA RAHIM IN SUPPORT OF MEMO OF COSTS AFTER JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RAHIM, ZIA DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT RAHIM, ZIA
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY BANKSON, SHAWN
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RAHIM, ZIA
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $455.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RAHIM, ZIA
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT, CCP 585D FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $5,723.24 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED FEB-27-2008, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT RAHIM, ZIA
